name: Peanut Butter Turtles
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice an apple in half.
2. Make several slits in each half.
3. Fill the slits with peanut butter or sesame butter.
4. Attach seedless grapes for the head and legs using toothpicks.
5. Stick a carrot shaving on for the tail, tucking it into one of the slits.
6. Serve as a lunch treat.
